title: stelis molleturensis
intro: Stelis molleturensis, also known as the "orchid cactus," is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its unique, cactus-like appearance. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its alkaloid compounds. The health benefits of Stelis molleturensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Stelis molleturensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the skin for its medicinal benefits.
